description: You read an enemy's enhancement configuration and disrupt it precisely. Deal 10 + SIGNAL signal damage. Apply Silence and Stagger. If your SIGNAL exceeds their SIGNAL, apply Overheat 2 as well — you found the cascade point and triggered it deliberately.

title: Sutra's Grace
description: Your forge work carries spiritual resonance. When you use this card alongside a Forge Mending or healing card this turn, the healed ally also gains Fortify for 2 turns — your work realigns their Echomind as well as their hardware. If the ally is suffering from early Echomind misalignment, this card advances their realignment by one stage (GM pacing).

title: Suture Protocol
description: Emergency forge work performed in moments — the kind that should take an hour compressed into a breath. An ally within reach recovers HP equal to 6 + RESONANCE. Remove one debuff currently affecting them. This card may be played as part of the same turn as another Forge card without conflict.

title: Sutensai Protocol
description: Forge Mending performed as a Sutensai rite — technical practice and spiritual care unified. One ally within reach recovers 12 + RESONANCE + SIGNAL HP. They also recover one expended once-per-combat card (GM ruling — a card with a once-per-combat limit). Both you and the healed ally gain Guard 4 against the next hit you each take.

title: The Body Endures
description: You are the bridge between flesh and survival. Choose one ally who has fallen to 0 HP this combat or who is currently at or below 25% HP. They immediately recover to 50% of their maximum HP. All debuffs are Cleansed from them. They gain Shield equal to your SIGNAL × 3 and Regen 4 for 3 turns. Once per combat.

title: The Body is the Temple
description: You have become, in the fullest expression of the Iron Sutra's most profound claim, the bridge between flesh and the divine. Your forge work is not merely technical — it is, in a specific and inarguable sense, sacred. All allies in the encounter immediately recover to full HP. All conditions and debuffs are Cleansed from all allies. All allies gain Regen 4 for 3 turns and Shield equal to your RESONANCE × 4. Once per combat — this is everything you have trained to be, given freely.

title: The Keeper's Knowledge
description: Your accumulated knowledge of the people you serve has become its own form of power and obligation. For each ally you have used Forge Mending on this combat: you know their precise HP at all times, you sense immediately if they fall unconscious, and healing cards used by any character on them recover + RESONANCE additional HP — your resonance record improves every healer's work.

title: The Living Forge
description: Your presence stabilizes enhancement networks in proximity. All allies within 30 feet who have received Forge Mending from you gain advantage on death-equivalent saves (GM ruling). Enhancement disruption effects on allies within 30 feet last 1 turn less than normal. When you use Forge Mending, the resonance radiates — all allies within 5 feet of the target recover RESONANCE HP as secondary healing.

title: The Work That Saves
description: You perform procedures that the Wire Market would declare impossible and the Sutensai would declare profane, and people are alive because you did. Deal 16 + SIGNAL signal damage to one enemy (the technical precision of someone who knows exactly how enhancement systems break). Simultaneously, heal the two lowest-HP allies in the encounter for 14 + RESONANCE HP each. Once per combat.

title: Void Mending
description: You repair enhancement damage caused by dissolution, void-edge weapons, or Iron Afterlife contact — the specific harm that standard medical kits cannot address. One ally recovers 12 + RESONANCE HP. Remove one instance of Overheat or Silence from them. If the ally has been exposed to Shell-state resonance or Iron Afterlife energy, this card also removes that contamination (GM ruling).

title: Adaptive Intercept
description: Triggered when a target within 60 feet uses a Signal or Resonance card. Redirect that card's effect to a target of your choice within range, or suppress it entirely. Suppressed card is wasted.

title: Blind Sensor
description: Disable one Wire-connected sensor or automated system within 60 feet for the scene. While disabled, it cannot transmit data, trigger alarms, or take actions. Out of combat, this lasts 1 hour.

title: Cascade Architect
description: Trigger a Wire cascade through all Signal-connected targets within 120 feet. Each takes 10 + SIGNAL damage and gains Silence for 1 round. Automated systems crash for the scene.

title: Cascade Flicker
description: Target one enhanced creature within 60 feet. Apply Stagger. Their Signal and Resonance cards cost 1 additional AP this turn.

title: Cascade Shutdown
description: All enhanced creatures within 30 feet of a point you can see within 60 feet make a SIGNAL contest (oppose with your SIGNAL). Failures: 18 + SIGNAL damage and Silence for 2 rounds. Successes: Stagger only.

title: Deep Immersion
description: Project your consciousness fully into the Wire network. Your physical body gains Guard 12. Your Wire-presence can move to any connected node within 300 feet and originate card effects from that location. Lasts until you end it as a free action or take damage exceeding your Guard.

title: Deep Read
description: Perform a comprehensive data extraction from any Wire system within 60 feet. You learn all stored information in the system. Encrypted data is also accessible. Out of combat, this provides the GM with a signal to deliver scene-relevant intelligence.

title: Echomind Intercept
description: Target one enhanced creature within 60 feet. Their Echomind connection is disrupted. They cannot use Resonance cards this round and take 12 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 3 to all Resonance damage they receive until end of their next turn.

title: Enhancement Disrupt
description: Target one enhanced creature within 60 feet. Deal 10 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Stagger. The target's highest-cost card costs +1 AP next turn.

title: Ghost Step
description: Move up to 30 feet without triggering reactions. You leave no Wire trace — sensor systems do not register this movement.

title: Ghost Sovereign
description: Become completely invisible to all Wire systems, sensors, and enhancement-detection for the scene. While active, enemy Signal and Control cards cannot target you unless the attacker has direct physical line of sight. Apply Veil to yourself each round.

title: Ghost Tag
description: Apply an invisible Wire tag to one creature within 60 feet. While tagged, you know their exact position within 300 feet. Tagged enemies cannot become hidden from you. Lasts until the end of the scene or until dispelled.

title: Identity Theft
description: Copy one target creature's complete Wire identity signature. For the scene, you register as that creature to all Wire systems, sensors, and enhancement scanners. Additionally, once this scene, force one enemy with a Wire system to treat you as an ally for 1 round (they cannot target you with hostile cards during that round).

title: Interference Pulse
description: Release a Wire disruption pulse in a 15-foot cone from you. Enhanced creatures in the area take 5 + SIGNAL damage and gain Stagger.

title: Iron Afterlife Touch
description: Access the boundary between the Wire and the Iron Afterlife. You perceive all Echomind echoes of creatures who have died within 300 feet in the last 24 hours. Out of combat: ask each echo one question. In combat: you may ask one echo one yes/no question as a free action.

title: Living Node
description: Your enhancement network becomes a Wire relay. You are aware of all Wire-active creatures within 120 feet and can route Signal cards through any of them as if they were your origin point. Enemies within 120 feet cannot become hidden from you via Wire means.

title: Mirror Protocol
description: Triggered when a Signal Attack card targets you or an ally within 30 feet. Reflect that card's base damage back at the attacker. You take no damage from the reflected card.

title: Network Collapse
description: All Wire-connected enemies within 120 feet take 20 + SIGNAL damage and gain Silence for 2 rounds. Automated Wire systems in the area crash for the rest of the scene. Enemies under Silence also lose 1 AP from their next turn.

title: Network Domination
description: Take administrative control of all Wire systems within 200 feet for the scene. Controlled systems obey your mental commands as a free action. Enemy Wire Craft cards used within the area must first overcome your SIGNAL — if your SIGNAL exceeds theirs, those cards are suppressed instead.

title: Neural Plague
description: Target one enhanced creature within 60 feet. Deal 14 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Overheat 3. If the target already has Overheat, they immediately lose 1 AP from their next turn and gain Stagger.

title: Neural Spike
description: Wire-enhanced melee strike. Deal 12 + SIGNAL damage. If this card hits an already-Staggered target, apply Silence for 1 round.

title: Phantom Signature
description: Create a convincing false Wire presence that moves along the network as you direct. Enemies targeting Wire signatures must succeed on a SIGNAL contest against your SIGNAL or spend their targeting card on the phantom instead. Lasts until end of scene or until three attacks are wasted on it.

title: Protocol Ghost
description: Step into the Wire and emerge at any connected node within 120 feet. During transit you cannot be targeted. On arrival, apply Veil — the first hostile card targeting you this turn loses all riders.

title: Redirect Feed
description: Triggered when an enemy uses a Wire Craft or Signal card within 60 feet. You hijack the feed: choose a new valid target for that card within its original range. The card resolves normally against your chosen target instead.

title: Signal Clone
description: Create a perfect false Wire identity that moves along the network. Enemies cannot distinguish the clone from you via Wire. Additionally, once this scene, misdirect one enemy's next Signal Attack toward the clone — the attack is wasted.

title: Signal Dart
description: Fire a targeted signal spike at one creature within 60 feet. Deal 6 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 1.

title: Signal Fortress
description: Establish total Wire dominance in a 300-foot radius for the scene. All Wire systems obey you. All Signal cards used within the area by enemies suffer -4 to their base damage. Any enemy attempting a Wire Craft action must contest your SIGNAL or fail.

title: Signal Mirror
description: For 1 round, every Signal Attack card targeting you or an ally within 30 feet is mirrored back at its source at full damage. You and allies take no damage from mirrored cards. Applies to up to 3 incoming cards this round.

title: Signal Skim
description: Send a focused signal spike at one target within 60 feet. Deal 5 + SIGNAL damage.

title: Signal Suppress
description: Target one enhanced creature within 60 feet. Apply Silence for 2 rounds. They take 8 + SIGNAL damage. While Silenced, they cannot gain Regen or Shield from cards.

title: Surface Read
description: Access any Wire node within 60 feet as a free action and read its most recent data. In combat, this reveals one piece of tactical information about an enemy (current HP bracket, a keyword on an unplayed card, or one status immunity). GM provides the information.

title: System Override
description: Take permanent control of one Wire-connected system within 120 feet. In combat: one Wire-connected enemy (a creature with Signal-based class features) is Stunned for 1 round — they cannot play cards. Out of combat: the system obeys you for the rest of the scene.

title: The Architect
description: You become the Wire for 1 round. You perceive all Wire-active creatures and systems within 300 feet. This round: all your Signal Attack cards deal +SIGNAL bonus damage. One enemy of your choice within 300 feet has all their Signal and Resonance cards suppressed. One ally of your choice within 300 feet may play one additional card this turn at no AP cost. After this turn, gain Overheat 2.

title: The Weave Speaks
description: Broadcast a Wire message to all Signal-connected creatures within 300 feet simultaneously. In combat: all enemies within range are Staggered and take 8 + SIGNAL damage. The message cannot be blocked or filtered. Out of combat: the message reaches every Wire-active creature in range regardless of encryption.

title: Total Override
description: Choose one enhanced enemy within 60 feet. Their enhancement network enters cascade failure. Deal 22 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Overheat 3, Silence, and Stagger simultaneously. If the target already had Overheat, they also lose their Basic Attack next turn.

title: Wire Anchor
description: Create a persistent Wire node at your current location. For the rest of the scene, you can play Wire Walk to this specific node from any connected point within 300 feet as a free action. The anchor persists even if you move.

title: Wire Burn
description: Release a Wire cascade surge. All enhanced creatures within 30 feet of a point within 60 feet take 18 + SIGNAL damage. All automated systems in the radius crash until the end of the scene.

title: Wire Crash
description: Target one Wire system or enhanced creature within 60 feet. Systems crash for the scene. Creatures: deal 10 + SIGNAL damage and apply Stagger. If the target has an active Silence, deal an additional 6 damage.

title: Wire Flood
description: Flood the Wire in a 60-foot radius with corrupted signal. All enhanced enemies in range take 16 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 2 to each target. Signal cards they play next turn are reduced to 0 base damage before stat modifiers.

title: Wire Lock
description: Lock or unlock any Wire-controlled door, barrier, or container within 60 feet. In combat: one enemy loses their Mobility card option this turn (Root). Out of combat: the effect is permanent until changed.

title: Wire Sovereign
description: Your Wire authority reaches its operational peak. Any Wire system you take control of (via System Override, Network Domination, or Signal Fortress) cannot be retaken by enemies this scene. Wire Crash cards you play deal +4 damage. You automatically succeed at accessing any unencrypted Wire system.

title: Wire Walk
description: Step into the Wire and emerge at any connected node within 120 feet. You cannot be targeted during transit. On arrival, your next Signal Attack card this turn deals +4 damage.

title: Adaptive Frame
description: Install an Experimental Frame on yourself or one ally within reach. That creature gains +2 IRON or +2 SIGNAL (choose) until end of scene. They also gain Guard 6. This temporary stat increase stacks with other modifiers.

title: Armor Config
description: Redistribute enhancement distribution on yourself or one ally within reach. Target gains Guard 8. Can be played as a Reaction when a target is hit.

title: Cascade Architecture
description: Broadcast a cascade reconfiguration across all enhanced enemies within 30 feet. Each takes 14 + SIGNAL damage and is Staggered. Enemies with Guard lose half their current Guard stacks (round down).

title: Cascade Build
description: Chain a reconfiguration through yourself and up to two allies within 30 feet. Each gains +2 to one stat of their choice (IRON, EDGE, or FRAME) until end of their next turn. Each also recovers 8 HP.

title: Circuit Spike
description: Drive a resonant spike into an enhanced target within melee range. Deal 7 + IRON damage. If the target has active Guard, Pierce 4 applies to this strike.

title: Combat Architecture
description: Perform a rapid hostile reconfiguration on an enemy within 30 feet. Deal 6 + SIGNAL damage and apply Stagger. Alternatively, perform an emergency ally boost: one ally within 30 feet gains +10 HP and their next card costs 1 fewer AP.

title: Configuration Mastery
description: Your reconfigurations have reached surgical depth. All Config cards you play (Speed Config, Armor Config, Strength Config, Sense Config, Phase Config, Resonant Config, Recovery Config) grant an additional secondary effect: the target also gains Regen 2 for 1 round after the Config resolves.

title: Deep Frame
description: Perform a deep resonance analysis on one willing ally or yourself within reach. They gain +2 FRAME until end of scene and their HP maximum increases by 10 for the scene. Gain Fortify for 1 round.

title: Dual Config
description: Apply two different Config cards simultaneously to one target (yourself or one ally within reach). Both effects resolve fully. The target gains a bonus: +3 to any one stat for 1 round.

title: Enhancement Crash
description: Target one enhanced enemy within 30 feet. Deal 10 + SIGNAL damage. Identify and crash their most recently used card type — they cannot play a card of that category next turn. Apply Stagger.

title: Experimental Surge
description: Install an experimental overclock on yourself or one ally within reach. Target gains +3 IRON and +3 EDGE until end of their next turn. They also deal +6 damage on their next Attack card. After the boost ends, target gains Overheat 1.

title: Field Surge
description: Amplify one ally's enhancement output for 1 round. Target ally's next Attack card deals +8 damage. This effect applies once and is consumed on use.

title: Forge Command
description: Issue a Forge-level reconfiguration command to all enhanced allies within 30 feet. Each gains Guard 10 and +2 to a stat of your choice (same stat for all) until end of the round. Enemies within 30 feet take 10 + SIGNAL damage and gain Stagger.

title: Forge Crash
description: Crash the enhancement network of one target within 30 feet. Deal 20 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Overheat 3 and Stagger. If the target already has Overheat, deal an additional 8 damage and apply Silence.

title: Forge Read
description: Analyze one creature's enhancement configuration within 30 feet. Learn their current HP bracket, one active keyword on an unplayed card, and one stat value of your choice. In combat, this takes no additional AP beyond the card cost.

title: Forge Sovereign
description: Your forge mastery reaches its operational apex. For the rest of the scene: all Config cards cost 0 AP. All ally reconfigurations grant an additional +2 to the target's highest stat. Your own IRON and SIGNAL each increase by 2.

title: Hostile Override
description: Force a hostile reconfiguration on one enhanced enemy within 30 feet. Apply a debilitating Config: choose one — reduce their IRON by 3, reduce their EDGE by 3, or reduce their SIGNAL by 3 until end of scene. Deal 16 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 3.

title: Hostile Reconfiguration
description: Remotely reconfigure one enhanced enemy within 30 feet. Deal 12 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Stagger. Their next card costs +1 AP as their reconfigured systems fight the new parameters.

title: Living Metal
description: Your own enhancements become fully adaptive. Gain +2 IRON and +2 SIGNAL until end of turn. Gain Guard 10. You may immediately play one Tier 1 card from your hand at 0 AP cost as a follow-up.

title: Maximum Output
description: Push one ally's enhancements to absolute maximum output. Target gains +4 IRON, +4 EDGE, and deals +12 damage on all Attack cards for 1 round. After the round, target gains Overheat 2.

title: Modification Read (Advanced)
description: Perform a deep enhancement analysis on one creature within 30 feet. Learn their full stat array, all active keywords in their hand, and their HP total (exact). For the rest of the scene, your Config cards applied to this creature grant +2 additional bonus to any stat modified.

title: Modification Scan
description: Scan one creature within 30 feet. Identify any active Stagger, Silence, Overheat, Expose, or Vulnerable effects on them. Learn one card category they have played this combat. Apply Mark to the target.

title: Overclock Protocol
description: Overclock yourself or one ally within reach for 1 round. Target gains +3 IRON and +3 EDGE. Their next Attack card deals +10 damage. After the effect resolves, gain Overheat 2. Cannot be used on the same target twice per scene.

title: Perfect Frame
description: Install a precisely calibrated Frame on yourself or one ally within reach. Target gains Guard 16, Regen 4 for 2 rounds, and +2 FRAME until end of scene. The Frame is seamless — it cannot be Dispelled.

title: Phase Config
description: Briefly phase one target's enhancements into partial incorporeality. Target can move through one solid barrier (wall, door, terrain feature) this turn without impediment. They also gain +3 EDGE until end of turn.

title: Recovery Config
description: Install a regenerative reconfiguration on one target within reach. Target recovers 14 HP immediately. Apply Regen 3 for 2 rounds. After Regen expires, target gains Overheat 1 (the body cannot sustain indefinite repair cycles).

title: Resonance Architect
description: Perform deep resonance restructuring on one ally within reach. Choose one: permanently increase one of their stats by 1 (takes effect immediately, persists beyond scene), or heal them for 20 HP and apply Guard 12 and Regen 3. Once per scene.

title: Resonance Patch
description: Perform an emergency resonance calibration on one ally within reach or yourself. Target recovers 8 HP and removes one active Overheat stack.

title: Resonance Profile
description: Build a deep resonance profile of one creature you can observe within 30 feet. For the rest of the scene, all Config cards and Attack cards targeting that creature deal +4 damage or +4 bonus to effect. Profile is lost if the target leaves the scene.

title: Resonance Transfer
description: Transfer your own enhancement resilience to one ally within reach. You gain Overheat 1. That ally gains Guard 14, Regen 4 for 2 rounds, and +2 to their primary stat until end of scene.

title: Resonant Amplifier
description: Amplify one ally's resonant output within reach. Their next Resonance or Signal Attack card deals +SIGNAL additional damage (add your SIGNAL, not theirs). Apply Expose 2 to the target they hit.

title: Resonant Architecture
description: For 1 round, all Config cards you play cost 0 AP. Each Config card played this round also applies its stat boost to yourself in addition to the primary target. You may play up to 3 Config cards this round.

title: Resonant Config
description: Reconfigure one ally's enhancement to channel resonant energy into their attacks. Target's next Attack card deals +8 resonant damage. Apply Expose 2 to the target they hit.

title: Sense Config
description: Recalibrate one target's sensory enhancements. Target ignores concealment and cover bonuses on their next attack. They also gain +2 EDGE until end of their next turn.

title: Soul Engineering
description: Perform a deep Echomind-enhancement alignment on one willing ally within reach. Choose one permanent improvement (once per scene, once per ally): that ally's primary stat increases by 1 until end of campaign, or they gain Regen 2 as a permanent passive that activates at the start of each scene.

title: Speed Config
description: Reroute one target's processing pathways. Target may immediately move up to 30 feet without triggering reactions. They also gain +2 EDGE until end of turn.

title: Strength Config
description: Amplify one target's physical enhancement output. Target gains +3 IRON until end of turn and deals +4 damage on their next melee Attack card.

title: Stress Override
description: Triggered when an ally within 30 feet is hit by an attack or has a card disrupted. Perform an emergency override: remove one negative status effect (Stagger, Silence, Expose, Overheat) from that ally and grant them Guard 6.

title: The Living Blueprint
description: Express the perfect configuration. Choose yourself and up to two allies within 30 feet. Each gains: +3 to their two primary stats until end of scene, Guard 12, and Regen 4 for 2 rounds. Each may immediately play one card from their hand at 0 AP cost. Enemies within 30 feet who observe this take 10 + SIGNAL damage from the cascading resonance discharge.

title: Total Config
description: Install a comprehensive full-system reconfiguration on one ally within reach. They gain +3 to all six stats until end of their next turn. They recover 16 HP. Their next three cards this turn cost 0 AP. After those cards resolve, they gain Overheat 2.

title: Total Reconfiguration
description: Perform a complete mid-combat reconfiguration of yourself. Reset all active Overheat stacks to 0. Gain +3 IRON, +3 SIGNAL, and +3 EDGE until end of scene. Recover 20 HP. Once per scene.

title: Apex Lock
description: Target one creature within 120 feet. Apply Expose 3. Their next defensive card costs +1 AP. If they are already Exposed, deal 12 + SIGNAL damage in addition.

title: Apex Precision
description: Fire a precision shot at one target within 120 feet. Deal 20 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Stagger. If the target is below half HP, they also gain Root — their next Mobility card is suppressed.

title: Area Pulse
description: Discharge a wide area pulse. All enemies within a 20-foot radius of a point within 60 feet take 10 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Stagger to each target hit.

title: Armor Pierce
description: Fire a shot that cuts through enhancement-assisted armor. Deal 7 + SIGNAL damage. Pierce 6 — ignore 6 points of Guard or Shield on this shot.

title: Between the Shots
description: Fire a shot that crosses the resonant layer, hitting both physical and spiritual targets in a 5-foot-wide, 120-foot line. All creatures (physical and incorporeal) in the line take 18 + RESONANCE damage.

title: Burst Protocol
description: Fire a high-capacity burst discharge at one target within 80 feet. Deal 16 + SIGNAL damage. If you have not moved this turn, deal +4 additional damage.

title: Convergence Field
description: Declare a 30-foot radius convergence zone within 120 feet. All enemies within take 18 + RESONANCE damage. All Signal and Resonance cards used within the zone by enemies this round deal 0 base damage (their stat modifier still applies). Lasts 1 round.

title: Convergence Line
description: Fire a charged shot that builds resonant energy along a 5-foot-wide, 80-foot line. All enemies in the line take 22 + SIGNAL damage. The line becomes a kill corridor until the start of your next turn — any enemy who enters it takes 8 damage immediately.

title: Dead Eye
description: Take a moment to lock targeting and fire. Deal 14 + SIGNAL damage to one target within 120 feet. Apply Expose 2. If you have not moved this turn, apply Pierce 4 in addition.

title: Dead Zone
description: Declare a 60-foot radius Dead Zone centered on a point within 120 feet. For 2 rounds: enemies within the zone take 10 + SIGNAL damage when they first enter it and cannot use Mobility cards. You move freely through the zone without restriction.

title: Discharge Mastery
description: Your discharge system has reached full calibration. All your Tier 1 Attack cards deal +4 damage. You may play two different Attack cards in a single turn as if they cost 1 fewer AP each (minimum 0, once per turn total reduction).

title: Disruption Round
description: Fire a shot targeting enhancement systems rather than the body. Deal 8 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Stagger and Silence for 1 round. The target cannot play Signal or Resonance cards on their next turn.

title: Double Tap
description: Fire two rapid shots at the same target within 80 feet. First shot deals 5 + SIGNAL damage. Second shot deals 5 + SIGNAL damage. Each shot is resolved separately — Guard and Shield apply to each individually.

title: Field Denial
description: Lock down a 60-foot radius area within 120 feet for 2 rounds. Any enemy entering the area from outside takes 14 + SIGNAL damage. Enemies within the area cannot use Mobility cards. You designate the area when you play this card.

title: Fluid Engagement
description: Move up to 30 feet without triggering reactions. After moving, immediately play one Tier 1 Attack card from your hand at 0 AP cost as part of this card's resolution.

title: Focused Discharge
description: A deliberate, fully-aimed shot at one target within 120 feet. Deal 14 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 2. If the target has Expose already active, deal +6 additional damage.

title: Full Suppression
description: Execute a comprehensive suppression discharge in a 60-foot radius within 80 feet. All enemies in the area take 12 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Root to each. They cannot use Mobility cards or take reactions until the start of their next turn.

title: Intention Made Real
description: Channel your pre-conscious targeting into a single perfect shot. Deal 24 + SIGNAL damage to one target within 120 feet. This card cannot be negated by Veil, Mirror Protocol, or redirect effects — the shot was already in flight before it was decided. Apply Stagger and Expose 3.

title: Kill Zone
description: Establish a Kill Zone in a 30-foot radius within 80 feet. For 2 rounds, any enemy who moves more than 15 feet within the zone takes 8 + SIGNAL damage. Enemies who end their turn in the zone gain Expose 1.

title: Living Weapon Protocol
description: Your integration has reached full synthesis. For the rest of the scene, all your Attack cards deal +RESONANCE bonus damage (add your RESONANCE to every Attack card's damage in addition to SIGNAL). Your Basic Attack deals +8 damage. Once per scene.

title: Overcharge
description: Charge your discharge system to maximum and release. Deal 16 + SIGNAL damage to one target within 80 feet. Your system requires a cooldown — you cannot play another Attack card until the start of your next turn.

title: Overwatch Field
description: Activate a targeting field covering all enemies within 80 feet. For 1 round, any enemy that moves triggers a free Basic Attack from you (max 3 per round). Enemies cannot benefit from cover bonuses against your attacks while the field is active.

title: Pre-Conscious Strike
description: Your firing system acts before deliberate decision. Deal 12 + SIGNAL damage to one target within 80 feet. This card may be played as a Reaction when an enemy declares an attack or card against you, resolving before their action.

title: Precision Lock
description: Lock your targeting system onto one enemy within 120 feet. Apply Mark. Your next Attack card against this target deals +6 damage. Mark is consumed when the bonus triggers.

title: Pulse Dominance
description: Release a full-power resonant discharge. All enemies within 40 feet of a point you can see within 120 feet take 20 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 2 and Stagger to each. Automated Signal systems in the area crash for 1 round.

title: Pulse Shot
description: Fire a standard integrated pulse at one target within 80 feet. Deal 6 + SIGNAL damage.

title: Pulse Volley
description: Fire a volley of pulses at up to three targets within 60 feet. Each takes 8 + SIGNAL damage. Targets share no damage — each is hit individually.

title: Resonant Barrage
description: Unleash a sustained resonant barrage at one target within 120 feet. Deal 22 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Expose 3. If the target is a Signal-class enemy, they also gain Silence for 1 round.

title: Resonant Cascade
description: Build resonant charge through the firing sequence. Deal 10 + SIGNAL damage. Each consecutive time you hit the same target this scene, this card deals +4 additional cumulative damage (maximum +20 after 5 hits).

title: Resonant Charge
description: Channel resonant energy into your next shot. Deal 12 + RESONANCE damage to one target within 100 feet. Apply Expose 2. If the target has already been hit by a Resonant card this scene, deal +6 additional damage.

title: Resonant Purge
description: Fire a spiritually-calibrated discharge in a 30-foot radius within 80 feet. All creatures take 16 + RESONANCE damage. All Iron Afterlife presences in the area are expelled. All enhancement-disruption effects (Silence, Stagger, Overheat) on allies in the area are Cleansed.

title: Resonant Round
description: Fire a spiritually-tuned shot at one target within 80 feet. Deal 10 + RESONANCE damage. If the target is an incorporeal or Iron Afterlife entity, this shot deals full damage regardless of any damage reduction or immunity.

title: Ricochet Shot
description: Fire a shot that bounces from the primary target to one secondary target within 20 feet. Primary target takes 6 + SIGNAL damage. Secondary target takes 6 + SIGNAL damage. Resolve each hit separately.

title: Signal Flood
description: Flood a 40-foot radius within 100 feet with resonant signal discharge. All enemies take 14 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Overheat 2 to each target. Wire-connected enemies also gain Stagger.

title: Snapshot
description: Triggered when an enemy enters your line of sight within 80 feet or declares movement. Fire immediately before their action resolves. Deal 5 + SIGNAL damage. Apply Expose 1.

title: Soul Shot
description: Fire a shot tuned to the resonant layer, bypassing physical defenses. Deal 20 + RESONANCE damage to one target within 100 feet. This card ignores Guard, Shield, and Fortify. Apply Silence for 1 round. If the target is an Iron Afterlife entity, they are expelled from the physical world immediately.

title: Suppression Line
description: Lay suppressive fire along a 15-foot-wide line extending 60 feet from you. Any enemy crossing the line this round takes 5 + SIGNAL damage and gains Root until the start of their next turn.

title: System Feedback
description: Triggered when you are hit by a ranged or Signal attack. Your nervous system feedback loop absorbs the hit. Gain Guard 8 against that attack. Immediately fire a Pulse Shot at the attacker at 0 AP cost.

title: System Synchrony
description: Your weapon integration becomes hardened against disruption. Your integrated discharge cannot be Silenced, Staggered, or suppressed by any card this scene. Your Pulse Shot Basic Attack deals +4 damage for the rest of the scene. Once per scene.

title: The Living Weapon
description: You are the weapon. Declare a Convergence Shot. Choose any target you can perceive within 120 feet. Deal 26 + SIGNAL damage. This card cannot be redirected, mirrored, or negated. Apply Stagger, Expose 3, and Silence simultaneously. After firing, your Basic Attack deals +RESONANCE damage for the rest of the scene.

title: Thermal Read
description: Scan one target within 80 feet before your next attack. Learn their current HP bracket (high/mid/low), one keyword active on an unplayed card, and one stat value of your choice. Your next Attack card against this target deals +4 damage.

title: Total Discharge
description: Release your full resonant energy store in a single discharge at one target within 120 feet. Deal 24 + SIGNAL damage. Pierce 8. Apply Expose 3, Stagger, and Overheat 2 to the target. Your discharge system requires a full reset — you cannot play Attack cards until the start of your next turn.

title: Absolute Strike
description: A strike of total Between-channeled intent. Deal 20 + IRON damage. This card cannot be reduced by Guard, Shield, or Fortify. Apply Stagger and Expose 3. **Below half HP:** Deal an additional 8 damage and apply Root.

title: Between Absolute
description: Enter a state of total Between awareness for 1 round. All incoming damage is reduced by 10 (before Guard). You cannot be targeted by Control cards. Your next Attack card this turn deals +RESONANCE bonus damage.

title: Between Anchor
description: Root yourself in the Between. Gain Guard 7 and Fortify. You cannot be moved by forced movement this round. **Below half HP:** Also gain Regen 3 for 1 round.

title: Between Flicker
description: Briefly phase between physical and resonant states. Move up to 40 feet without triggering reactions, passing through one solid barrier if needed. On arrival, gain +2 EDGE until end of turn. **Below half HP:** Also apply Expose 2 to the nearest enemy within 10 feet on arrival.

title: Between Mastery
description: The Between is no longer a resource — it is your state. For the rest of the scene: your Resonant Strike and Perfect Strike cards deal +4 damage. Your Guard cards provide +4 additional Guard. Your mobility cards cannot be countered by Root or Stagger.

title: Between Sense
description: Extend your Between awareness. Detect all enhanced creatures and active Signal/Resonance cards within 60 feet. Learn one keyword from an unplayed card each detected enemy holds. In combat, this also reveals hidden or concealed enemies within 30 feet.

title: Between Sight
description: Your Between attunement pierces illusion and concealment. For 1 round, you cannot be surprised, cannot be targeted by Veil effects, and detect the exact position of all concealed creatures within 60 feet. **Below half HP:** Also apply Mark to all detected enemies.

title: Between Step
description: Move up to 30 feet. This movement does not trigger reactions. You may pass through enemy-occupied spaces.

title: Between Ward
description: Triggered when an ally within 15 feet is hit. Halve the damage they receive. **Below half HP:** The Between absorbs even more — reduce the damage to zero if it would have been 10 or less.

title: The Between Made Flesh
description: You become the living proof of the Sutra's promise. For 1 round: all your Attack cards deal maximum base damage (no variance — the number is fixed at its highest value). You cannot be reduced below 1 HP by any single hit. Your Basic Attack deals +RESONANCE damage. Enemies who hit you with melee attacks take 10 + RESONANCE damage as feedback. After this round, gain Overheat 2 and lose 8 HP (the cost of perfect expression).

title: The Between Speaks
description: Channel the Between into a burst that disrupts all enhancements within 20 feet. All enemies in range take 18 + RESONANCE damage and gain Stagger and Silence for 1 round. Allies within 20 feet gain Guard 8 and Regen 2.

title: Deliberate Breath
description: Center yourself in the Between. Gain Guard 6. Your next Attack card this turn deals +4 damage from the stillness. **Below half HP:** Guard increases to 10.

title: Empty Hand
description: A strike that carries no force — only the Between. Deal 10 + RESONANCE damage. This card ignores Guard and Shield entirely. Apply Expose 2. **Below half HP:** Also apply Stagger.

title: Final Breath
description: The Between holds you. Once per scene: when this card would reduce you to 0 HP instead, you remain at 1 HP. This effect triggers automatically — it does not require your action. If played proactively: gain Guard 14 and Regen 4 for 2 rounds.

title: Harmonized Step
description: Move up to 40 feet through any terrain without impediment, including difficult terrain, vertical surfaces, and hazardous ground. This movement does not trigger reactions. **Below half HP:** Gain +2 EDGE until end of turn.

title: Iron Apotheosis
description: Push your Between-integration to its absolute limit. Gain +4 IRON and +4 RESONANCE until end of turn. Your next two Attack cards each deal +12 damage. After both cards resolve, lose 10 HP (the cost of maximum output). **Below half HP:** The bonus damage increases to +18 per card.

title: Iron Ascendancy
description: A cascading sequence of Between-empowered strikes. Play up to two Attack cards from your hand as part of this card's resolution, each at 0 AP cost. Each card deals +6 additional damage. **Below half HP:** Each card deals +12 additional damage instead.

title: Iron Aftermath
description: After taking significant damage (10+ in a single hit this round), the Between hardens around you. Gain Guard 16 and Regen 5 for 2 rounds. Apply Fortify. **Below half HP:** Also immediately recover 12 HP.

title: Iron Body
description: Your Between-hardened body shrugs off what would stop others. Gain Guard 7 and immunity to Stagger for 1 round. **Below half HP:** Also gain Regen 3 and immunity to Silence for 1 round.

title: Iron Body Complete
description: Achieve the Sutra's promised state for 1 round. You cannot be reduced below 1 HP. All incoming damage is reduced by 8 before Guard. Your IRON and RESONANCE each increase by 3. **Below half HP:** You deal +RESONANCE damage on all attacks for the duration.

title: Iron Communion
description: Deepen your Between connection mid-combat. Recover 10 HP. Remove one active Stagger, Silence, or Expose effect from yourself. **Below half HP:** Recover 16 HP instead and remove two effects.

title: Iron Discipline
description: The Between steadies you. Remove one Overheat, Expose, or Vulnerable stack from yourself. Gain Guard 5. **Below half HP:** Guard increases to 9.

title: Iron Endurance
description: Absorb an incoming hit through the Between. Gain Guard 8. If you are hit by an attack this turn despite your Guard, recover 4 HP (the Between recycles the impact). **Below half HP:** Guard increases to 12.

title: Iron Guard
description: Brace in the Between. Gain Guard 7. Incoming forced movement is reduced by 20 feet this round.

title: Perfect Balance
description: Your Between movement has become effortless. Move up to 50 feet through any terrain without triggering reactions. Gain Guard 8. For 1 round, Root and Stagger effects do not reduce your mobility or AP.

title: Perfect Endurance
description: For 1 round, all damage you take is reduced by 12 before Guard applies. You cannot be Silenced or Staggered. Your Basic Attack deals +8 damage. **Below half HP:** You also cannot be reduced below 1 HP this round.

title: Perfect Strike
description: A Between-guided strike that lands exactly where it must. Deal 12 + IRON damage. Pierce 8 — this strike ignores 8 points of Guard and Shield. **Below half HP:** Deal 18 + IRON damage instead.

title: Precision Cascade
description: A rapid sequence of targeted Between-strikes. Deal 8 + IRON damage to one target. Then deal 6 + IRON damage to the same or a different target within reach. Each hit is resolved separately. **Below half HP:** Each strike deals +4 additional damage.

title: Resonant Barrier
description: Project a Between barrier that covers yourself and one ally within 15 feet. Both gain Guard 10. **Below half HP:** The barrier is more intense — Guard increases to 14 for yourself, 10 for the ally.

title: Resonant Defense
description: Triggered when you are hit by an attack. Channel the Between between you and the strike. Gain Guard 6 against that attack. **Below half HP:** Guard increases to 10.

title: Resonant Devastation
description: Release everything the Between has built in you. Deal 22 + RESONANCE damage to one target within melee range. Pierce 6. Apply Expose 3, Stagger, and Silence. **Below half HP:** Also deal 10 + RESONANCE damage to all other enemies within 15 feet as resonant overflow.

title: Resonant Form
description: Enter full Resonant Form for 1 round. Your Attack cards deal +8 damage. Enemies who hit you in melee take 8 + RESONANCE damage. Gain Regen 3 for the round. **Below half HP:** Attack bonus increases to +14 damage, and Regen increases to 5.

title: Resonant Pulse
description: Release a pulse of Between energy from your body. All enemies within 15 feet take 10 + RESONANCE damage and are pushed 10 feet away. **Below half HP:** Damage increases to 16 + RESONANCE and all affected enemies gain Stagger.

title: Resonant Rebuke
description: Triggered when an enemy hits you with a melee attack. Immediately strike back. Deal 12 + IRON damage. Apply Expose 2. **Below half HP:** Deal 16 + IRON damage instead and apply Stagger.

title: Resonant Sovereign
description: Your Between mastery reaches its operational peak. For the rest of the scene: your IRON and RESONANCE each increase by 2. Your below-half-HP bonuses on all cards activate even when above half HP. Once per scene.

title: Resonant Strike
description: A Between-channeled strike. Deal 6 + IRON damage. This attack counts as resonant — it affects incorporeal and Iron Afterlife entities at full damage. **Below half HP:** Deal 10 + IRON damage instead.

title: Suffering Engine
description: Convert your damage into Between energy. When you take 10 or more damage in a single hit, your next Attack card this scene deals +10 damage. This bonus stacks — each qualifying hit adds +10 to the pool (maximum +30). The pool resets when you use it.

title: Sustained Between
description: Hold the Between state under pressure. Remove one Stagger, Silence, or Root effect from yourself. Gain Fortify for 1 round. **Below half HP:** Also recover 8 HP.

title: The Living Sutra
description: You are the Sutra expressed. Deal 16 + IRON damage to one target within melee range. All allies within 30 feet who can see you recover 8 HP and gain Guard 8. **Below half HP:** Your attack deals 24 + IRON damage instead, and allied recovery increases to 14 HP.

title: Void Brush
description: The Iron Afterlife's edge no longer unmakes you. Gain immunity to Silence and Stagger for 1 round. Gain Guard 8. Once per scene: if a hit would reduce you to 0 HP, reduce it to 1 HP instead (automatic, no action required). **Below half HP:** Guard increases to 12.

title: Void Culmination
description: Channel everything you have endured into a single expression of the Between. Deal 20 + IRON damage to one target. Pierce 8. For every 10 HP you have lost this scene (not current, total lost), deal +4 additional damage (maximum +20). Apply Expose 3 and Stagger.

title: Void Edge
description: Strike from the Between's edge. Deal 14 + IRON damage. This card deals +6 additional damage for each Control effect (Stagger, Silence, Root, Expose, Overheat) currently active on the target.

title: Afterlife Attunement
description: Deepen your Veil connection. Detect all Echomind presences (living and dead) within 60 feet. Learn one piece of tactical information about one enemy — their current HP bracket, an active status effect, or one card category they hold. In combat, this also reveals any Iron Afterlife entities active in the area.

title: Afterlife Army
description: Call upon the dead who have unfinished business nearby. For 1 round, spiritual presences harass all enemies within 30 feet. Each enemy takes 12 + RESONANCE damage and gains Stagger. Enemies cannot use Veil cards this round — the dead drown out their social manipulation.

title: Anchor of the Living
description: You become a stable point between the worlds. Any ally within 30 feet who would be reduced to 0 HP this round is instead held at 1 HP. They do not make death checks this round. This effect triggers once per round automatically — it does not cost your action when it triggers.

title: Between Witness
description: Project your full awareness into the Iron Afterlife while remaining physically present. For 1 round, you perceive both worlds simultaneously. You learn the true motivations, last words, and death circumstances of any creature who has died in the area within the past year. In combat: apply Expose 3 to all enemies as the dead reveal their weaknesses to you.

title: Beyond the Veil
description: The Iron Afterlife no longer looks at you with hostility. Gain immunity to Silence and Stagger from Iron Afterlife sources for the rest of the scene. Gain Guard 8. Your next RESONANCE card this turn costs 0 AP.

title: Dead Chorus
description: Channel a chorus of dead voices into a disorienting wave. All enemies within 20 feet take 10 + RESONANCE damage and gain Stagger. Enemies with active Silence take an additional 6 damage — the dead they cannot hear speak anyway.

title: Dead Reckoning
description: The dead name the guilty. Target one enemy within 60 feet. Deal 22 + VEIL damage. Apply Expose 3, Stagger, and Silence. For the rest of the scene, this enemy cannot benefit from Veil effects or concealment — the dead have marked them.

title: Dead Voice
description: Channel a dead voice as a weapon — grief and accusation made audible. Deal 6 + RESONANCE damage to one target within 30 feet. Apply Expose 1.

title: Dead Weight
description: Channel the weight of the dead onto one enemy within 30 feet. Deal 10 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Root and Stagger. The target feels the accumulated grief of those they have harmed — they cannot use Veil cards next turn.

title: Echo Absolute
description: The dead stand between you and harm. For 1 round, all damage you take is reduced by 12 before Guard applies. Allies within 20 feet gain Guard 10. Any enemy who deals damage to you or an ally this round takes 8 + RESONANCE damage as the dead strike back.

title: Echo Armor
description: The dead reinforce you. Gain Guard 8. While Guard is active from this card, you cannot be targeted by Veil or social manipulation cards — the dead notice and intercept.

title: Echo Barrage
description: Release a barrage of dead voices and resonant grief at up to three targets within 40 feet. Each takes 8 + RESONANCE damage and gains Expose 1.

title: Echo Engine
description: — (see Grief Engine)

title: Echo Shield
description: Triggered when you or an ally within 20 feet is targeted by an attack. The dead intercept — apply Guard 6 to the target. The attacker takes 4 + RESONANCE damage as spiritual backlash.

title: Echo Storm
description: Call a wave of spiritual static from the Iron Afterlife. All creatures within a 20-foot radius of a point within 60 feet take 16 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Stagger. All Signal and Resonance cards used in the area this round are Silenced.

title: Echo Torrent
description: Unleash a torrent of grief and dead voices across a 30-foot cone. All enemies in the cone take 18 + RESONANCE damage and gain Stagger and Expose 2.

title: Echomind Fracture
description: Target one enemy within 30 feet. Their Echomind is cracked open by the weight of the dead. Deal 14 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Silence for 2 rounds, Stagger, and Expose 3. While Silenced by this card, the target hears the voices of those they have harmed — they cannot use Veil cards for the duration.

title: Grief Blade
description: Channel accumulated grief into a focused strike. Deal 12 + RESONANCE damage to one target within 30 feet. For every ally who has been reduced to 0 HP this scene, deal +4 additional damage (maximum +16). Apply Expose 2.

title: Grief Cascade
description: Unleash a cascade of grief, accusation, and dead testimony at all enemies within 25 feet. Each takes 14 + RESONANCE damage and gains Stagger. Enemies with Expose active take an additional 8 damage.

title: Grief Engine
description: Convert accumulated grief into power. Each time an ally or enemy dies within 30 feet of you this scene, gain a Grief stack (maximum 5). Each Grief stack adds +3 damage to your RESONANCE Attack cards. At 5 stacks, your next RESONANCE Attack card also applies Stagger and Expose 2 automatically, then stacks reset.

title: Grief Weapon
description: Speak a word of grief that lands like a blow. Deal 5 + VEIL damage to one target within 30 feet. If the target has an active Expose effect, deal +4 additional damage.

title: Iron Afterlife Call
description: Open a direct channel to the Iron Afterlife. In combat: learn the true nature of one enemy — their actual motivations, any active deceptions, and one card they are holding. Out of combat: contact any dead individual whose name or signature you know; they answer as completely as they are able.

title: One Foot Gone
description: Your partial presence in the Iron Afterlife shields you. Gain resistance to the next source of RESONANCE damage this round (halve it). Gain Guard 10. For 1 round, you cannot be Silenced — the dead keep your voice open.

title: Relay
description: Channel a dead voice through your own. One enemy within 30 feet hears an accusation or truth they cannot dismiss. Apply Stagger and Expose 1. Out of combat: a specific dead individual may speak through you for up to 1 minute, saying whatever they choose.

title: Resonant Grief
description: Your grief becomes a resonant weapon. Deal 14 + RESONANCE damage to one target within 40 feet. If you have lost an ally this scene, deal +8 additional damage. Apply Expose 2.

title: Spirit Speech
description: Speak words that carry spiritual weight and cannot be silenced or suppressed. One statement you make this round cannot be countered by Veil, Signal, or deception effects. In combat: apply Stagger to all enemies within 20 feet who can hear you. The truth of the dead is louder than their defenses.

title: Spirit Ward
description: The dead form a protective presence around you. Gain Guard 6 and Fortify for 1 round. Enemies who target you with Veil cards this round have those cards lose their rider effects — the dead strip away the manipulation.

title: Speak for the Fallen
description: Formally accuse one enemy within 30 feet on behalf of the dead. Apply Expose 3 and Stagger. The target cannot use Veil cards this round — the dead drown out their social armor. Out of combat: this accusation carries spiritual weight; it cannot be denied in any community that respects the Iron Afterlife.

title: Sustained Veil
description: Extend your Veil Walking into a sustained projection. For 1 round, you perceive both the physical world and the Iron Afterlife simultaneously. Hidden enemies are revealed. Iron Afterlife entities are visible and targetable by your cards. Gain +2 RESONANCE until end of turn.

title: The Accuser
description: The dead speak through you with absolute authority. Name one enemy within 60 feet. Deal 16 + VEIL damage. Apply Expose 3, Silence for 2 rounds, and Root. For the rest of the scene, this enemy cannot benefit from Guard, Shield, or Fortify — the dead have stripped their defenses.

title: The Dead Remember
description: Access the Iron Afterlife's collective memory of this location. In combat: learn one fact about each enemy — their current HP total, one card they have not yet played, or one status immunity. Out of combat: ask the Afterlife one question about any event that occurred in the past year within 1 mile.

title: The Fallen Speak
description: Every dead voice you have ever carried speaks at once. All enemies within 40 feet take 20 + RESONANCE damage and gain Stagger, Expose 2, and Silence for 1 round. Allies within 40 feet recover 10 HP and gain Guard 8 — the dead protect those who honor them.

title: Veil Apotheosis
description: Become fully the bridge between the living and the dead. For 1 round: your RESONANCE and VEIL each increase by 3. Your RESONANCE Attack cards deal +VEIL additional damage. Your Control cards cannot be countered by Fortify or Veil effects. Once per scene.

title: Veil Collapse
description: Tear the Veil between worlds open in a 25-foot radius within 60 feet. All enemies in the area take 18 + RESONANCE damage and gain Stagger and Silence for 2 rounds. Any Iron Afterlife entities in the area become fully manifest and hostile to all living creatures (GM determines specifics).

title: Veil Disruption
description: Release disrupting spiritual energy at one creature within 30 feet. Deal 12 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Stagger and Expose 2. Creatures with no Echomind are immune to the Stagger but take full damage.

title: Veil Dominion
description: Your connection to the Veil becomes total. For the rest of the scene: you detect all hidden, concealed, and invisible creatures within 60 feet. You cannot be surprised. Your RESONANCE Attack cards deal +4 damage. All Control effects you apply last 1 additional round.

title: Veil Reach
description: Extend your Veil influence to touch a target at range. Target one enemy within 60 feet. Deal 10 + VEIL damage. Apply Stagger and Expose 1. The target cannot become hidden or concealed for the rest of the scene — the dead have marked them.

title: Veil Sense
description: Open your awareness to the dead. Sense all Echomind presences within 60 feet, including hidden and concealed creatures. Learn whether each enemy has taken damage this scene and their HP bracket. In combat, also learn one active keyword on an unplayed card each enemy holds.

title: Veil Sovereign
description: Your dominion over the space between the living and dead reaches its peak. For the rest of the scene: allies within 30 feet cannot be reduced below 1 HP by a single hit (once per ally per scene). Your RESONANCE and VEIL cards each deal +4 damage. Once per scene.

title: Veil Tear
description: Tear the Veil and release concentrated Afterlife energy at one target within 60 feet. Deal 22 + RESONANCE damage. Pierce 6. Apply Expose 3 and Silence for 2 rounds. If the target is an Iron Afterlife entity, this card expels them from the physical world immediately.

title: Veil Walking
description: Project your senses briefly into the Iron Afterlife. For 1 round, you perceive the Afterlife overlay on your current location. In combat: reveal all concealed enemies and learn one unplayed card category from each. Your physical body gains Guard 4 while projected.

title: Voice of Both Worlds
description: Open the Veil fully in a 30-foot radius for 1 round. All dead with unfinished business in the area speak simultaneously — every enemy takes 18 + RESONANCE damage, gains Stagger, Silence, and Expose 3. Every ally recovers 14 HP and gains Guard 12. Any ally reduced to 0 HP this round is held at 1 HP by your presence. When this card resolves, you are reduced to 1 HP — the bridge, used fully, costs everything. You cannot be reduced below 1 HP until the start of your next turn.

title: Afterlife Anchor
description: Establish a permanent Afterlife anchor point at your current location. For the rest of the scene, you can teleport to this anchor as a free action (once per round). Additionally, one ally you designate can use your anchor as a destination for their own Mobility cards.

title: Afterlife Navigation
description: Phase through the Iron Afterlife to a location you have visited. Teleport to any point within 200 feet that you have previously been to this scene. On arrival, you are invisible for 1 round — the physical world does not immediately register your return.

title: Afterlife Perception
description: Open your Afterlife senses fully. Detect all Echomind signatures within 60 feet, including concealed and hidden creatures. Learn one enemy's HP bracket and one keyword from an unplayed card they hold. Iron Afterlife entities within range are automatically revealed and targetable.

title: Afterlife Walk
description: Step fully into the Iron Afterlife and walk through it. Teleport to any point within 300 feet you have visited. During transit you cannot be targeted. On arrival, gain Veil for 1 round and +3 EDGE until end of turn. You may bring one willing ally with you.

title: Between Sight
description: Your Afterlife Perception pierces all concealment. For 1 round, you cannot be surprised, cannot be affected by Veil cards, and detect the exact location of every creature within 60 feet regardless of concealment, invisibility, or phasing. Apply Mark to one detected enemy.

title: Between Strike
description: Strike from between worlds — your weapon phases through defenses before solidifying at impact. Deal 14 + EDGE damage. Pierce 8. If you are currently in incorporeal state (via Phase Step), this card deals +6 additional damage.

title: Between the Worlds
description: Declare Void Sovereignty over a 100-foot radius for 1 round. You control all phase-related phenomena in the area. Every ally within range can use Mobility cards at 0 AP cost this round. Every enemy within range cannot use Mobility cards or Phase cards — the space between worlds belongs to you. Any enemy who dies this round has their Echomind held — they cannot pass to the Afterlife until you release them. After this card resolves, gain Overheat 2 and lose 10 HP.

title: Between the Worlds Protocol
description: For the rest of the scene: you exist partially in both worlds simultaneously. You gain +3 RESONANCE and +3 EDGE. All your Phase cards cost 0 AP. You cannot be surprised. Your Basic Attack deals +RESONANCE damage. Once per scene.

title: Ghost Sight
description: Extend your Afterlife Perception through solid matter. For 1 round, see through up to 30 feet of walls and solid objects as an Afterlife impression. Hidden enemies within this range are revealed. In combat, learn one piece of information about an enemy you locate this way — their HP bracket or one card they hold.

title: Ghost Sovereign
description: Become completely undetectable for 1 round. You are invisible to all senses — physical, resonant, Wire Craft, and Afterlife. During this round, your Attack cards deal +RESONANCE damage and you cannot be targeted by any card. After the round ends, you reappear at a location of your choice within 30 feet.

title: Phase Absolute
description: Enter an absolute phase state. For 1 round, you cannot be hit by any Attack card — all attacks pass through you. You can still play cards and move normally. At the end of the round, phase back fully and immediately play one free Attack card from your hand.

title: Phase Assault
description: Phase into an enemy's space and strike from within. Deal 14 + RESONANCE damage. Pierce 6. Apply Stagger. After the strike, you phase out and reappear up to 20 feet away — this movement does not trigger reactions.

title: Phase Cascade
description: Phase through up to three enemies in sequence, striking each. Move up to 60 feet total, passing through each enemy's space. Each enemy takes 12 + EDGE damage and gains Expose 2. This movement does not trigger reactions.

title: Phase Dodge
description: Triggered when you are targeted by an attack. Phase briefly — the attack passes through you. Gain Guard 8 against that attack. After it resolves, you reappear up to 10 feet from your original position.

title: Phase Everything
description: Phase yourself and all allies within 20 feet simultaneously. All phased creatures gain Guard 12 and cannot be targeted by Attack cards for 1 round. On return, each phased creature may teleport up to 20 feet to any unoccupied space. Once per scene.

title: Phase Field
description: Extend a phase field over a 20-foot radius centered on you. For 1 round, any ally entering the field gains Guard 8. Any enemy entering the field takes 8 + RESONANCE damage and gains Stagger — the between-space rejects them.

title: Phase Immunity
description: Your familiarity with incorporeal states makes you resistant to control. For 1 round, you cannot be Staggered, Silenced, or Rooted. Gain Guard 8. You may use Phase Step as a Reaction this round at 0 AP cost when hit by an attack.

title: Phase Master
description: Your phase transitions have become instantaneous and effortless. For the rest of the scene: Phase Step can be played as a Reaction at 0 AP cost (once per round). All your Mobility cards move you +10 feet further than listed. Your EDGE increases by 2.

title: Phase Strike
description: Strike from incorporeal state with full force. Deal 12 + EDGE damage. If you are currently incorporeal (via Phase Step), this card deals +8 additional damage and applies Expose 2. After this strike, you may immediately move up to 20 feet — this movement does not trigger reactions.

title: Phase Step
description: Step out of physical reality. You become incorporeal until the start of your next turn. While incorporeal: you cannot be targeted by Attack cards, you can move through solid barriers, and your attacks deal +4 damage (you strike from the between-space). On return, reappear up to 15 feet from where you phased.

title: Perfect Phase
description: Your incorporeal state has become effortless and indefinite. Enter Phase Step at no AP cost as part of playing this card. You remain incorporeal for 2 rounds instead of 1. While incorporeal under Perfect Phase, you can interact with physical objects normally — picking locks, opening doors, retrieving items.

title: Sovereignty Declared
description: Assert Void dominance over a 60-foot radius. For 1 round: no enemy can use Phase, Mobility, or Afterlife cards within the area. Any enemy who attempts phasing takes 12 + RESONANCE damage. Allies within the area gain +2 EDGE and cannot be Rooted.

title: Sustained Phase
description: Extend your incorporeal state to 2 rounds. While sustained-phased: you are invisible to non-Afterlife senses, you can move freely through terrain, and you cannot be targeted by Signal cards. You can end the state early as a free action on your turn.

title: The Disappeared
description: Vanish completely from the physical world and reappear anywhere within 200 feet you have previously visited. During transit, you cannot be detected by any means. On arrival: apply Veil for 1 round and deal 10 + EDGE damage to one enemy within 10 feet of your arrival point as a free action.

title: The Void's Memory
description: Commune with the Afterlife's memory of this location. In combat: learn the exact HP total, all active status effects, and all card categories held by one enemy within 60 feet. Out of combat: ask the Afterlife one question about any event within 20 miles over the past year. The answer comes in fragments.

title: Transit Network
description: Your Afterlife anchor network becomes fully operational. You may have up to 3 active anchor points. Teleporting between anchor points costs 0 AP and can be done once per round as a free action. One designated ally may also use your anchor network to teleport between your anchors.

title: Transit Step
description: Phase through the Afterlife and emerge up to 40 feet away. This movement cannot be blocked by terrain, barriers, or effects. You cannot be targeted during transit. On arrival, gain +2 EDGE until end of turn.

title: Veil Resilience
description: The Iron Afterlife has reshaped your resilience. Gain Guard 6. You cannot be reduced below 1 HP this turn by any single hit — the Afterlife is not yet ready to accept you permanently.

title: Void Apotheosis
description: Become fully between worlds for 1 round. You exist in both simultaneously — you cannot be hit (all attacks pass through), you deal +RESONANCE to all your cards, and you can teleport up to 30 feet as a free action at any point during your turn. After this round, gain Overheat 2. Once per scene.

title: Void Bleed
description: Bleed Afterlife energy into the physical world at one target within 40 feet. Deal 12 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Expose 2 and Bleed 3 — the Afterlife continues to drain them at the end of each of their turns.

title: Void Burst
description: Release a burst of concentrated Iron Afterlife energy in a 20-foot radius within 40 feet. All enemies take 18 + RESONANCE damage and gain Stagger. All Signal communication in the area is disrupted for 1 round — Signal and Resonance cards used by enemies in the area this round deal 0 base damage.

title: Void Dominion
description: Your mastery of the between-space reaches its operational peak. For the rest of the scene: all your Mobility cards cost 0 AP. Your EDGE and RESONANCE each increase by 2. Enemies cannot become hidden or concealed from you. Once per scene.

title: Void Eruption
description: Channel a massive eruption of Afterlife energy at a point within 80 feet. All enemies within 30 feet of that point take 20 + RESONANCE damage. Apply Stagger and Expose 2 to each. Incorporeal and Afterlife entities in the area are expelled from the physical world.

title: Void Master
description: Assert total mastery over the between-space. For 1 round: all incoming damage is halved before Guard applies. You can teleport up to 50 feet as a free action at any point during your turn. Your Attack cards deal +8 damage. The Iron Afterlife cannot harm you while this card is active.

title: Void Pull
description: Pull one target within 40 feet through a brief Void transit. Willing target: teleport them to any unoccupied space within 40 feet of their origin. Unwilling target: deal 8 + RESONANCE damage and teleport them to a space of your choice within 30 feet. Apply Stagger to unwilling targets.

title: Void Rend
description: Tear a rift through the between-space directly into one target within 60 feet. Deal 22 + RESONANCE damage. Pierce 8. Apply Expose 3 and Stagger. The rift lingers — the target takes 6 damage at the start of their next turn as the Afterlife continues to pull at them.

title: Void Sense
description: Extend your Afterlife Perception to its fullest passive range. Detect all Echomind presences within 80 feet. You automatically know whether each creature is living, dead, or partially phased. Hidden and concealed creatures within 40 feet are revealed. Learn one active keyword on an unplayed card from each enemy detected.

title: Void Slip
description: Triggered when a card targets you or when you are in melee range of an attacker. Slip briefly into the between-space — move up to 20 feet without triggering reactions and reappear in an unoccupied space. The triggering attack misses if it relied on your original position.

title: Void Sovereign
description: Assert Void authority over a 60-foot radius. For 1 round: you teleport freely within the area at 0 AP cost. All allies within the area gain Guard 10. All enemies within the area cannot use Phase or Mobility cards. You may designate one dead creature whose Echomind is in the area — they are held stable and cannot pass to the Afterlife until you release them.

title: Void Step
description: Phase and reappear. When you return from Phase Step (incorporeal state), choose to reappear at any unoccupied space within 25 feet of where you phased, as long as you have line of sight or have previously been there.

title: Void Strike
description: A strike channeled through the between-space. Deal 6 + RESONANCE damage to one target within melee range. If you are incorporeal when you play this card, deal 10 + RESONANCE damage instead and apply Expose 1.

title: Echomind Reading
description: Target one creature within 30 feet. Learn their current HP tier (full / wounded / critical), whether they carry active spiritual violations, and their general resonant alignment. Until the end of combat, your VEIL cards against this target deal +2 damage.

title: Sutra Condemnation
description: Deal 5 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target within 40 feet. If the target has a spiritual violation active, apply Expose 2.

title: Iron Ward Pulse
description: Apply Guard 4 + RESONANCE to yourself or one ally within 20 feet. Spirits and Afterlife entities cannot enter the warded space until the start of your next turn.

title: Afterlife Inquiry
description: You send a formal query into the Iron Afterlife. Ask the GM one yes/no question about a named dead individual. Answer arrives as a resonant impression at the start of your next turn.

title: Authority Seal
description: Deal 4 + VEIL social damage to one target within 30 feet. Apply Root. Any target that fails to resist this card also cannot willingly close distance with you this turn.

title: Spiritual Stricture
description: Deal 10 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target within 40 feet. Apply Stagger. Cost: pay 4 HP instead of 1 AP (play this card for 1 AP + 4 HP).

title: Doctrinal Silence
description: Apply Silence to one target within 30 feet until the start of your next turn. Silenced targets cannot play Signal or Resonance cards.

title: Sutra Ward
description: *Trigger: An ally within 20 feet is targeted by a Resonant or Signal attack.* Reduce incoming damage by 5 + RESONANCE. Apply Guard 3 to that ally.

title: Weight of Law
description: Deal 8 + VEIL social damage to one target within 30 feet. Apply Expose 3 and Stagger. Cost: pay 6 HP instead of 2 AP (play for 0 AP + 6 HP).

title: Radiant Sentence
description: Deal 12 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target within 50 feet. If you have performed Echomind Reading on this target this combat, apply Vulnerable 3.

title: Rite of Passage
description: A creature that died within the last minute is sealed into the Iron Afterlife cleanly. They cannot be reanimated or puppeted this combat. Allies who witness the rite gain Regen 2 until end of their next turn.

title: Doctrinal Violence
description: Deal 14 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target within 40 feet. Cost: pay 8 HP instead of 2 AP (play for 0 AP + 8 HP).

title: Inquisitor's Eye
description: *While in hand, passive.* You always sense when a creature within 30 feet is lying about spiritual matters. Once per combat, when an enemy uses a Utility or Social card within range, you may declare it false — canceling its non-damage riders.

title: Echomind Suppress
description: Apply Silence and Stagger to one target within 40 feet until the start of your next turn. If the target has any Resonance cards in their hand, they lose 1 AP this turn.

title: Caste Condemnation
description: Deal 10 + VEIL social damage to one target within 30 feet. Apply Expose 4. All allies within 20 feet may immediately play one 0-AP card as a free reaction.

title: Archive Pull
description: You retrieve a specific resonant memory from the Sutensai spiritual archive. Remove one debuff (Silence, Stagger, Root, or Expose) from yourself or an ally within 20 feet. Gain Guard 3 + RESONANCE.

title: Prior's Echo
description: Deal 13 + RESONANCE resonant damage in a 20-foot cone. All targets in range take Expose 2. Cost: pay 10 HP instead of 2 AP (play for 0 AP + 10 HP).

title: Channel Prior
description: Choose one effect: (A) Deal 18 + RESONANCE resonant damage to all enemies within 25 feet. (B) Apply Stagger and Root to all enemies within 25 feet until start of your next turn. (C) Restore 10 + RESONANCE HP to all allies within 25 feet.

title: Veil Authority
description: Target one spiritual entity or Afterlife-adjacent creature within 30 feet. They must obey one direct command on their next turn (no action required on your part). Against standard enemies, apply Stagger and Expose 3 instead.

title: Sutra of Binding
description: Apply Vulnerable 4 and Root to one target within 40 feet. Until the target breaks free (at end of each of their turns they may attempt to clear Root), any damage they take is increased by your RESONANCE.

title: Spiritual Arrest
description: Target one creature within 40 feet. Deal 16 + RESONANCE resonant damage. Apply Stagger, Root, and Silence simultaneously. Cost: pay 12 HP instead of 3 AP (play for 0 AP + 12 HP).

title: Reading Mastery
description: Perform a deep Reading on one target within 30 feet. All your cards against this target deal +RESONANCE bonus damage for the rest of combat. Apply Expose 3 to the target immediately.

title: Institutional Weight
description: Deal 12 + VEIL social damage to all enemies within 30 feet who are not currently in melee with an ally. Apply Stagger to each.

title: Iron Sutra Aura
description: *While in hand, passive.* You and all allies within 20 feet have Guard 2 at the start of each of your turns. Spiritual or Resonant attacks against the group deal −RESONANCE damage.

title: Sealed Departure
description: Seal one dead or dying creature against spiritual exploitation. Remove all spiritual debuffs from allies within 20 feet. Restore 6 + RESONANCE HP to one ally within 20 feet.

title: Rite of Watching
description: Until end of combat, you know the HP tier of all enemies at all times (no card required for Echomind Reading on new targets). Your Resonant Attack cards gain Pierce 3.

title: Compelled Testimony
description: Target one creature within 30 feet. Deal 10 + VEIL social damage and apply Vulnerable 3. The target cannot willingly benefit from concealment or Veil keyword effects this round.

title: The Full Weight
description: Formally condemn one target within 40 feet you have performed Echomind Reading on. Deal 20 + RESONANCE resonant damage. Apply Expose 5 and Vulnerable 4. All allies within 30 feet gain Guard 5 + RESONANCE.

title: Doctrinal Purge
description: Deal 18 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target and 9 + RESONANCE to all enemies adjacent to them. Cost: pay 14 HP instead of 3 AP (play for 0 AP + 14 HP).

title: Sutensai's Truth
description: Target one creature within 40 feet. Deal 16 + VEIL social damage. Apply Silence, Stagger, and Expose 4. For the rest of combat, the target cannot use social or deception-based card riders.

title: Prior's Conduit
description: Deal 15 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target. Echo (repeat base damage once, no riders). Cost: pay 10 HP instead of 2 AP (play for 0 AP + 10 HP).

title: Voice of the Dead
description: Channel one of the Six Prior Ascended. Deal 22 + RESONANCE resonant damage in a 30-foot radius. All enemies in range are Staggered. All allies in range gain Regen 4 until end of their next turn.

title: Afterlife Condemnation
description: Deal 24 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target. Apply Vulnerable 5 and Expose 5. The target cannot receive healing from any source until the start of your next turn.

title: Rite of Peace
description: Apply Guard 8 + RESONANCE to yourself and all allies within 20 feet. Remove one debuff from each ally in range.

title: Absolute Witness
description: Target up to three creatures within 40 feet. Each takes 12 + VEIL social damage and is Silenced and Staggered. Cost: pay 16 HP instead of 3 AP (play for 0 AP + 16 HP).

title: Channel Prior (Twin)
description: Invoke two Prior effects simultaneously (choose two from Channel Prior's list). Deal 20 + RESONANCE resonant damage to all enemies in 25 feet and restore 8 + RESONANCE HP to all allies in 25 feet.

title: Living Archive
description: Remove all debuffs from yourself. Gain Shield 10 + RESONANCE. Until end of combat, your Echomind Reading is free (0 AP) and reveals full HP values on targets.

title: Sutra Annihilation
description: Deal 26 + RESONANCE resonant damage to one target. Apply Vulnerable 5, Expose 5, and Silence. Cost: pay 18 HP instead of 3 AP (play for 0 AP + 18 HP).

title: Institutional Reckoning
description: Deal 18 + VEIL social damage to all enemies within 40 feet. Apply Stagger and Expose 3 to each. All allies within 30 feet gain Guard 6 + RESONANCE.

title: The Last Reading
description: *The Final Reading. The full accounting.* Target one creature within 40 feet. Deal 28 + RESONANCE resonant damage. Apply Expose 6, Vulnerable 5, Silence, Stagger, and Root simultaneously. Choose one judgment: (A) **Absolved** — remove all debuffs from all allies within 30 feet, restore 12 + RESONANCE HP to each. (B) **Condemned** — the target takes an additional 14 + RESONANCE resonant damage at the start of each of their next three turns. Both judgments carry the force of formal Sutensai law. Cost: pay 20 HP instead of 3 AP (play for 0 AP + 20 HP).

title: Flesh Sense
description: Passive component: you always know the HP tier (full / wounded / critical) of all living creatures within 30 feet. Active component: target one creature within 30 feet. Learn their exact current HP and any active debuffs or structural damage they carry.

title: Touch Mend
description: Restore 6 + SIGNAL HP to one ally you are adjacent to or yourself. Remove one Bleed stack from the target.

title: Organic Strike
description: Deal 5 + IRON melee damage to one adjacent target. If the target has organic components, apply Bleed 2.

title: Cellular Fortify
description: Apply Guard 4 + SIGNAL to one ally within 10 feet. Their organic tissue resists the next instance of Bleed or Burn damage this round.

title: Diagnostic Touch
description: Touch one creature. Remove one debuff of your choice from them and restore 4 + SIGNAL HP. If they are at critical HP, restore 8 + SIGNAL HP instead.

title: Pain Architecture
description: Deal 8 + IRON melee damage to one adjacent target with organic components. Apply Expose 3 and Stagger. The target's FRAME is treated as 2 lower for damage threshold purposes until your next turn.

title: Tissue Graft
